$comment: c33 D-CSUBSET-TENTATIVE-DEFINITION: a file-scope object without an initializer is a TENTATIVE DEFINITION (C 6.9.2). tentative+def merges (def's init wins), def+tentative merges (reverse order), two tentatives merge into one zero-initialized object. load_g()+load_d()+load_z() = 40+2+0 = 42, read across non-inlined calls so the merged storage is exercised at runtime. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop the Pass-1 tentative fold -> `int g; int g = 40;` collide S_RedeclaredSymbol -> the program no longer COMPILES (compile failure, not exit 42). The release arm re-witnesses under the shipped pipeline (one ordinary global per name; the absorbed tentative emits no node).
